name: yardsailing
description: Find, create, and manage yard sales
author: jim shelly

skills.name: find-sales
skills.description: Find yard sales near a location. Use when user asks about sales, garage sales, or estate sales nearby.

skills.name: create-sale
skills.description: Help user create a yard sale listing. Gather info conversationally or present a form.

examples.prompt: Show me yard sales near me
I want to create a yard sale
What yard sales are happening this weekend?
